title: Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Bat
content:
Twinkle, twinkle, little bat!
How I wonder what you're at!
Up above the world you fly,
Like a teatray in the sky.
Twinkle, twinkle
meaning:
Lewis Carroll's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Bat"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
